overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city rooftop at dusk, showcasing neon-lit mega-skyscrapers, a luxury infinity pool, and dense urban architecture. The footage is clearly from a high-end game engine, featuring smooth camera movement along elevated walkways and pool decks with flying vehicles visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an elevated rooftop walkway bordered by glass railings, with a palm tree in a white planter visible on the right. The view overlooks a dense cyberpunk cityscape at dusk, dominated by a massive arch-shaped mega-skyscraper with glowing orange windows and scattered neon holographic signs.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a luxurious rooftop pool deck featuring an illuminated infinity pool. The camera moves along the pool's edge, passing lounge chairs and palm trees in black planters. A large digital billboard with red text is visible on the left building, while flying vehicles occasionally pass through the distant sky between the towering cyberpunk structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a high-end rooftop terrace that transitions from a scenic walkway into a luxurious pool area. It begins by gliding along an elevated path bordered by glass railings and white planters, overlooking a dense cyberpunk cityscape dominated by a massive arch-shaped mega-skyscraper with glowing orange windows. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts from the urban vista toward a sleek rooftop deck featuring an illuminated infinity pool. The scene then expands along the water's edge, passing lounge chairs and black planters while a red digital billboard flickers on a nearby building. Finally, the view opens up to the distant sky where flying vehicles drift between the towering neon structures of the city at dusk.
